name: Castle Nacho Grande
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread 1/3 of the salsa on the bottom of a 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
2. Sprinkle with half a cup of shredded cheese and chopped onion.
3. Cut each sandwich into 4-6 pieces and arrange them on top of the salsa, cheese, and onion.
4. Add more salsa, shredded cheese, onion, and black olives.
5. Pour nacho cheese over everything and bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
7. Top with lettuce, chopped tomatoes, onions, shredded cheese, black olives, and sour cream dollops.
8. Serve with nacho chips.
